mapper.select:
SELECT BUSINESS_ID AS businessId, USER_ID AS userId, BUSINESS_NAME AS businessName, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, PHONE AS phone, DESCRIPTION AS description, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM LQ_BUSINESS
AND ( BUSINESS_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR ADDRESS LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND USER_ID = #{userId}
ORDER BY BUSINESS_ID DESC

SELECT BUSINESS_ID AS businessId, USER_ID AS userId, BUSINESS_NAME AS businessName, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, PHONE AS phone, DESCRIPTION AS description, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM LQ_BUSINESS WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}

SELECT BUSINESS_ID AS businessId, USER_ID AS userId, BUSINESS_NAME AS businessName, ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, ADDRESS AS address, ADDRESS_DETAIL AS addressDetail, PHONE AS phone, DESCRIPTION AS description, CREATED_AT AS createdAt FROM LQ_BUSINESS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT #{businessId} AS "businessId", COUNT(*) AS "totalAuthCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN AUTH_TYPE = 'QR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "qrAuthCount", NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN AUTH_TYPE = 'RECEIPT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS "receiptAuthCount", NVL(SUM(NVL(PAYMENT_AMOUNT, 0)), 0) AS "totalPaymentAmount", NVL(SUM(NVL(SETTLEMENT_AMT, 0)), 0) AS "totalSettlementAmount", TO_CHAR(MAX(CREATED_AT), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS "lastAuthAt", COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) AS "uniqueUserCount", COUNT(DISTINCT LOCATION_ID) AS "uniqueLocationCount" FROM LQ_BUSINESS_AUTH_LOG WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}

SELECT auth.totalAuthCount AS totalAuthCount, auth.qrAuthCount AS qrAuthCount, auth.receiptAuthCount AS receiptAuthCount, auth.todayAuthCount AS todayAuthCount, auth.todayQrAuthCount AS todayQrAuthCount, coupon.todayCouponUseCount AS todayCouponUseCount, auth.totalPaymentAmount AS totalPaymentAmount, auth.totalSettlementAmount AS totalSettlementAmount, auth.lastAuthAt AS lastAuthAt, auth.authUserCount AS authUserCount, auth.authLocationCount AS authLocationCount FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalAuthCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN AUTH_TYPE = 'QR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS qrAuthCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN AUTH_TYPE = 'RECEIPT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS receiptAuthCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayAuthCount, NVL(SUM(CASE WHEN TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND AUTH_TYPE = 'QR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS todayQrAuthCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(PAYMENT_AMOUNT, 0)), 0) AS totalPaymentAmount, NVL(SUM(NVL(SETTLEMENT_AMT, 0)), 0) AS totalSettlementAmount, MAX(CREATED_AT) AS lastAuthAt, COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) AS authUserCount, COUNT(DISTINCT LOCATION_ID) AS authLocationCount FROM LQ_BUSINESS_AUTH_LOG WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId} ) auth CROSS JOIN ( SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) AS todayCouponUseCount FROM LQ_REWARD_EXCHANGE RE WHERE UPPER(NVL(RE.STATUS, '')) = 'USED' AND RE.USED_AT IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(RE.USED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LQ_BUSINESS_AUTH_LOG BL WHERE BL.BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId} AND BL.USER_ID = RE.USER_ID AND BL.AUTH_TYPE = 'RECEIPT' AND TRUNC(BL.CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(RE.USED_AT) ) ) coupon

SELECT TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'HH24')) AS hourOfDay, COUNT(*) AS authCount FROM LQ_BUSINESS_AUTH_LOG WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId} AND TRUNC(CREATED_AT) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'HH24') ORDER BY TO_CHAR(CREATED_AT, 'HH24')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LQ_BUSINESS ( business_id, user_id, business_name, zip_code, address, address_detail, phone, description, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_LQ_BUSINESS_PK.nextval, #{userId}, #{businessName}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{phone}, #{description}, sysdate )
mapper.update: UPDATE LQ_BUSINESS SET USER_ID = #{userId}, BUSINESS_NAME = #{businessName}, ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode}, ADDRESS = #{address}, ADDRESS_DETAIL = #{addressDetail}, PHONE = #{phone}, DESCRIPTION = #{description} WHERE BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId}
